product: Databricks Genie app for Slack (Public Preview) ​
tagline: June 9, 2026 The Databricks Genie app for Slack is now available in Public Preview.
what_it_does: June 9, 2026 The Databricks Genie app for Slack is now available in Public Preview. The app brings Genie into Slack so users can get answers to data questions without leaving Slack.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
